mapper.select: SELECT dm.*, mm.nx_mm_id, mm.nx_mm_wx_openid, mm.nx_mm_wx_nickname, mm.nx_mm_name, mm.nx_mm_phone FROM nx_machine_device_manager dm LEFT JOIN nx_machine_market_manager mm ON dm.nx_dm_manager_id = mm.nx_mm_id WHERE dm.nx_dm_device_id = #{deviceId} AND dm.nx_dm_enable = 1 ORDER BY dm.nx_dm_is_primary DESC, dm.nx_dm_create_time DESC

SELECT dm.*, pd.nx_pd_id, pd.nx_pd_device_no, pd.nx_pd_device_name, pd.nx_pd_location, pd.nx_pd_paper_count, pd.nx_pd_status FROM nx_machine_device_manager dm LEFT JOIN nx_machine_printer_device pd ON dm.nx_dm_device_id = pd.nx_pd_id WHERE dm.nx_dm_manager_id = #{managerId} AND dm.nx_dm_enable = 1 ORDER BY pd.nx_pd_device_name ASC

SELECT dm.*, mm.nx_mm_id, mm.nx_mm_wx_openid, mm.nx_mm_wx_nickname, mm.nx_mm_name, mm.nx_mm_phone, mm.nx_mm_subscribe_status FROM nx_machine_device_manager dm LEFT JOIN nx_machine_market_manager mm ON dm.nx_dm_manager_id = mm.nx_mm_id WHERE dm.nx_dm_device_id = #{deviceId} AND dm.nx_dm_enable = 1 AND mm.nx_mm_status = 1 AND (dm.nx_dm_is_primary = 1 OR dm.nx_dm_notify_level <= #{alertLevel}) ORDER BY dm.nx_dm_is_primary DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nx_machine_device_manager ( nx_dm_device_id, nx_dm_manager_id, nx_dm_notify_level, nx_dm_is_primary, nx_dm_enable, nx_dm_create_time ) VALUES ( #{nxDmDeviceId}, #{nxDmManagerId}, #{nxDmNotifyLevel}, #{nxDmIsPrimary}, #{nxDmEnable}, NOW() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM nx_machine_device_manager WHERE nx_dm_id IN
#{nxDmId}
